studies.title: Evaluation of the intervention “Cannabis – quo vadis?” with the aim of preventing cannabis use in adolescence
studies.brief_summary: The present study aims to evaluate the effectiveness of the prevention programme "Cannabis - quo vadis?" for cannabis prevention in schools. "Cannabis - quo vadis?" is a two-hour interactive prevention program designed for young people. The intervention is taught by prevention specialists who have been trained in a two-day workshop. In this research project, a questionnaire will be used to investigate the impact of "Cannabis - quo vadis?" on students in grades 8 and 9 and how they evaluate the implementation of the prevention program. The evaluation study will be conducted as a waiting control group design with three measuring points. Longitudinal data on knowledge about cannabis, attitudes towards cannabis use, behavioural intentions towards cannabis use as well as cannabis use behaviour are collected. After the intervention, the students will evaluate the implementation of the course at one time.
